MAP ANALYSIS - Act 1 vs The Guardian

Starting options: x=0, x=3, x=4 (all Monster rooms)

Route from x=0: F1:M(0)→F2:M(1)→F3:?(1)→F4:?(1)→F5:?(2)→F6:E(2) or R(0/1)
Route from x=3: F1:M(3)→F2:?(4)→F3:M(4)→F4:M(3)→F5:?(2)→F6:E(2) or R(0/1)  
Route from x=4: F1:M(4)→F2:?(4)→F3:M(4)→F4:M(3)→F5:?(2)→F6:E(2) or M(3)

Target: 2 elites per heuristics. Elites at F6(x=2), F8(x=0), F10(x=1), F12(x=0).

BEST ROUTE (x=3 or x=4 start):
F1:M(3or4)→F2:?(4)→F3:M(4)→F4:M(3)→F5:?(2)→F6:E(2)→F7:M(1)→F8:?(2)→F9:T(2)→F10:E(1)→F11:M(1)→F12:S(1)→F13:R(1)→F14:?(1)→F15:R

This gives 2 elites + rest before boss. Starting x=3 is good.

Actually wait, let me trace more carefully. x=3→[2] means F2 x=2 which is Monster(x=2)→[1]. Then F3 ?(1)→[1,2]. Hmm, the arrows mean children x-coords.

Let me re-read: F1 Monster(x=3)→[2] means the child is at x=2.
F2: Monster(x=2)→[1]. Child at x=1.
F3: Unknown(x=1)→[1,2]. Children at x=1 and x=2.
F4: Unknown(x=1)→[2] or Monster(x=2)→[2]. Both lead to x=2.
F5: Unknown(x=2)→[1,2,3].
F6: Rest(x=1) or Elite(x=2) or Monster(x=3).

Route x=3: M→M→?→?or M→?→then Elite at F6 or Rest. 
Can hit Elite at F6 (x=2) after 4 fights + 1 unknown. Good timing.
After F6 Elite(x=2)→F7:M(1). Then F7:M(1)→[0,1,2]. Can go to F8 Elite(x=0) for 2nd elite!
F8:E(0)→F9:T(0)→F10:R(0). Rest after 2 elites. 

PLAN: x=3→M(3)→M(2)→?(1)→?(1)or M(2)→?(2)→E(2)→M(1)→E(0)→T(0)→R(0)→M(0)→E(0) or S(1)→R(1)→?(1)→R(15)→Boss

Going x=3 for the 2-elite route with good rest coverage.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Cultist uses Incantation T1 (no damage). Play all 3 Strikes for 18 damage. Save Defends for T2 when it attacks.

events.translated: Bash → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Bash for 8 dmg + Vulnerable, then Strike for 9 dmg (6*1.5). Total 17 damage, Cultist to 17 HP. Take 6 from Cultist, Burning Blood heals 6 post-combat. Kill T3.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: 2 Strikes for 18 damage (9 each with Vulnerable) kills Cultist at 17 HP. Defend with remaining energy just in case.
Looking at card reward options
All 3 cards are weak. Clash is too restrictive, Wild Strike adds a Wound, Flex is temporary. None fill Act 1 gaps (healing, Str scaling, AOE, block scaling). Skip to keep deck thin.
Keeping current potions (Smoke Bomb, Blessing of Forge, Strength). Proceeding to map.

One Strike for 9 damage (Vulnerable) kills Louse at 8 HP. No need to overplay.

None fill key gaps. Blood for Blood too expensive at 4E base. Anger bloats deck. Juggernaut needs block synergy I dont have. Skip to keep deck thin.

Opening shop

Shop analysis: Spot Weakness (73g) fills critical Str scaling gap - HIGH PRIORITY. Whirlwind (34g) fills AOE gap. Both for 107g leaves 28g. Feel No Pain needs exhaust cards I dont have. Card removal is 75g which I cant afford alongside Spot Weakness. Buying Spot Weakness + Whirlwind fills 2 of 4 Act 2 readiness criteria (front-loaded Str and AOE).

Whirlwind at 3E = 10*3=30 AOE damage to both sentries. Sentry 1 to 10 HP, Sentry 2 to 8 HP. Take 9 from Sentry 1 (25 HP). Near-kill setup for next turn.

events.translated: Strike → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → End Turn

HIGH PRIORITY. Mass Vulnerable to ALL enemies for 1E. Synergizes with Spot Weakness and Whirlwind. Critical for Act 2 multi-enemy fights.

Pre-boss rest decision: 55/80 HP (68%) is below 70% threshold. Heuristic says rest over upgrade. Blood Potion gives +16 during fight. Rest to 79 HP + Ancient Tea Set gives 5E T1 vs Guardian. Upgrade is tempting but survival comes first.

events.label: Pre-Boss

Below 70% HP threshold. Rest to 79 HP. Ancient Tea Set gives 5E T1 vs Guardian since previous room is rest.

GUARDIAN BOSS PREP:
Deck: 15 cards (8 Attacks, 7 Skills)
Key cards: Bash+ (10+3Vuln), Spot Weakness (+3Str), Double Tap (double next attack), Whirlwind (AOE X), Pommel Strike (9+draw), Shrug It Off (8+draw), Thunderclap (4+Vuln)
Potions: Smoke Bomb, Blood Potion, Attack Potion
Relics: Burning Blood (+6), Ancient Tea Set (+2E T1), Oddly Smooth Stone (+1 Dex)

GUARDIAN PATTERN:
Offensive: Charging Up(9 block) → Fierce Bash(32) → Vent Steam(2Weak+2Vuln) → Whirlwind(5x4=20)
Mode Shift: 30 threshold first cycle. After that 40, 50...
Defensive: Sharp Hide(3 retaliation) → Roll Attack(9) → Twin Slam(8x2)

STRATEGY:
- T1 (5E from Tea Set): Play Spot Weakness if Guardian attacks, setup. Charging Up is not an attack so Spot Weakness fails T1.
- T1 is Charging Up (safe): Play Double Tap + big attack for burst. Or play setup cards.
- Actually Guardian T1 Charging Up = 9 block, no damage. FREE TURN for setup.
- T1 plan: Spot Weakness WONT work (no attack). Play damage into Guardian to push Mode Shift.
- Save Bash+ for when Vulnerable will benefit multiple subsequent turns.
- Double Tap + Whirlwind in one turn = massive burst to trigger Mode Shift.
- Blood Potion for emergency heal.
- Attack Potion for free card.

MODE SHIFT TIMING: Guardian has 240 HP. Mode Shift at 30 means first cycle, when I deal 30 damage, it switches to Defensive. Then Sharp Hide + Roll Attack + Twin Slam. Then back to Offensive with Mode Shift at 40.

KEY: Try to trigger Mode Shift on the Fierce Bash (32 damage) turn to cancel it!

events.reasoning:

Mode Shift: 30 threshold first cycle. After that 40, 50...
Defensive: Sharp Hide(3 retaliation) → Roll Attack(9) → Twin Slam(8x2)

- T1 is Charging Up (safe): Play Double Tap + big attack for burst. Or play setup cards.

Heading to the boss fight
Heading to The Guardian boss fight

events.command: play Bash+ 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Shrug It Off; end
events.translated: Bash+ → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → Shrug It Off → End Turn
events.reasoning: T1 free turn (Charging Up). 5E from Tea Set. Bash+ for 10+Vuln, 2 Strikes at 9 each = 28 damage toward Mode Shift 30. Shrug It Off draws + 9 block. Nearly triggers Mode Shift.

events.command: play Pommel Strike 0; play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Pommel Strike → The Guardian → Defend → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Pommel Strike for 13 damage (9 base * 1.5 Vuln). Breaks 9 block, 4 through. Should trigger Mode Shift (only 2 needed) and CANCEL the 32 damage Fierce Bash! Then 3 Defends for safety. Critical defensive play.
Guardian in Defensive Mode - applying Sharp Hide (BUFF). No incoming damage. 2 Defends for 12 block (6*2 with +1 Dex). Block carries for Sharp Hide retaliation next turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Strike → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Defend for 6 block vs 9 Roll Attack. 2 Strikes for 9+9=18 damage (Vuln). Sharp Hide costs 3+3=6 HP. Net: take 3 from Roll + 6 from Sharp Hide = 9 total. Guardian to 190 HP.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: 3 Defends for 18 block (6*3 with Dex) fully blocks Twin Slam 16. No attacks = no Sharp Hide retaliation. After Twin Slam, Guardian returns to Offensive Mode.

events.command: play Spot Weakness 0; play Shrug It Off; play Pommel Strike 0; end
events.translated: Spot Weakness → The Guardian → Shrug It Off → Pommel Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Spot Weakness for +3 Str (enemy attacking). Shrug It Off for 9 block + draw. Pommel Strike for 12 damage (9+3) + draw. Block 9 vs Whirlwind 20 = take 11. Building Str for scaling.

events.translated: Pommel Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Pommel Strike for 12 damage (9+3 Str) + draw card. 12/40 toward Mode Shift. 9 block vs Whirlwind 20 = take 11.

events.command: play Double Tap; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Double Tap → Strike → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn! Double Tap + Strike = 18 (doubled) + Strike = 9. Total 27 damage. Mode Shift 28→1. One more damage next turn cancels Fierce Bash!

events.command: play Thunderclap 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Thunderclap → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Thunderclap (7 damage with +3 Str) should trigger Mode Shift (only 1 needed), cancelling 32-damage Fierce Bash! Strike for follow-up. Defend for insurance. This is the critical turn.

events.command: play Double Tap; play Pommel Strike 0; play Shrug It Off; end
events.translated: Double Tap → Pommel Strike → The Guardian → Shrug It Off → End Turn
events.reasoning: Double Tap + Pommel Strike = 12+12=24 damage (doubled). Shrug It Off for 9 block + draw. Block absorbs Roll Attack 9. Sharp Hide 3*2=6 self-damage. Net: take 6. Guardian to 116 HP. Massive damage output.
Shrug It Off for 9 block perfectly blocks Roll Attack 9. Take 0 damage. Guardian at 116 HP.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Pommel Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Pommel Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: 2 Defends for 12 block vs Twin Slam 16 = take 4. Pommel Strike for 12 damage + draw. Sharp Hide 3 from 1 attack. Total: take 7. Guardian to ~104 HP. Returns to Offensive Mode after this.

events.command: play Spot Weakness 0; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Spot Weakness → The Guardian → Defend → Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Spot Weakness for +3 Str (total +6 now). Defend for 6 block vs Whirlwind 20 = take 14. Strike for 12 damage (6+6 Str). Building Str for scaling - next turns attacks hit much harder.

events.command: play Double Tap; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Double Tap → Strike → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn (Charging Up)! Double Tap + Strike (doubled) + Strike = 12+12+12=36 damage with +6 Str. Mode Shift 38→2. Guardian to 56 HP. Nearly dead!

events.command: play Pommel Strike 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Pommel Strike → The Guardian → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Pommel Strike for 15 damage triggers Mode Shift (only 2 needed). Cancels 32 damage Fierce Bash! 2 Defends for 12 block for Defensive Mode. Guardian at ~41 HP. Nearly done!
Guardian buffing Sharp Hide (no damage). 2 Defends for 12 block as insurance for next turn Roll Attack. Guardian at 50 HP - close to victory.
Blood Potion for 16 HP heal. Going aggressive to kill Guardian fast. 32+16=48 HP gives safety margin.

events.translated: Strike → The Guardian → Whirlwind → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Strike 12 + Whirlwind 22 (11*2) = 34 damage. Guardian 50→16 HP. Sharp Hide 3*2=6, Roll Attack 9 = 15 total damage taken. With Blood Potion heal, at ~33 HP. Kill next turn.
Drawing for Bash+ (16 dmg kills) or Pommel Strike (15 dmg kills). 3/5 chance of Attack card. Block 9 from Shrug + any block card.

events.command: play Pommel Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Pommel Strike → The Guardian → Strike → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Pommel Strike 15 + Strike 12 = 27 damage. Guardian at 16 HP dies. Sharp Hide costs 6 HP but combat ends before Twin Slam. VICTORY!
KILLING BLOW! Strike for 12 damage on Guardian at 1 HP. Act 1 boss defeated!

ACT 1 BOSS DEFEATED! The Guardian down in 14 turns. Key moments: Mode Shift triggered 3 times, each cancelling Fierce Bash (32 damage). Spot Weakness gave +6 Str by end. Double Tap + burst attacks did massive damage on free turns. Good run so far.

events.label: Victory
events.reasoning: ACT 1 BOSS DEFEATED! The Guardian down in 14 turns. Key moments: Mode Shift triggered 3 times, each cancelling Fierce Bash (32 damage). Spot Weakness gave +6 Str by end. Double Tap + burst attacks did massive damage on free turns. Good run so far.
Taking Colorless Potion - free slot available
Viewing card reward
MUST-TAKE. 30 block for 2E. Best defensive card in the game. Solves block scaling gap for Act 2+. Saves from any big hit.
Proceeding to boss reward relic selection

Boss relic: Empty Cage (remove 2 cards) vs Pandoras Box (transform 8 Strikes/Defends) vs Calling Bell (3 relics + curse). Empty Cage is safest - deck goes from 15 to 13 with 2 fewer Strikes. Pandoras is too volatile (could ruin the deck). Calling Bell is high value but curse hurts. Going Empty Cage for consistency.

events.label: Boss Relic
events.reasoning: Boss relic: Empty Cage (remove 2 cards) vs Pandoras Box (transform 8 Strikes/Defends) vs Calling Bell (3 relics + curse). Empty Cage is safest - deck goes from 15 to 13 with 2 fewer Strikes. Pandoras is too volatile (could ruin the deck). Calling Bell is high value but curse hurts. Going Empty Cage for consistency.
Empty Cage - remove 2 Strikes to thin deck to 13 cards. Safe and consistent improvement.
Removing Strike 1 of 2
Removing Strike 2 of 2
Checking current state
Confirming card removal selection

ACT 2 ROUTE PLANNING - Boss: Bronze Automaton (300 HP, Hyper Beam 45 dmg)

Current state: 80/80 HP, 130g, 13 cards, no healing card.
CRITICAL: Need healing source ASAP. Shop at F2 is essential.

Map analysis - tracing paths:

PATH A (x=1 start): F1 Monster(1) -> F2 Shop(2) -> F3 Monster(2) or Unknown(3) -> F4 Monster(2) -> F5 Shop(2) -> F6 Monster(1) -> F7 Elite(1) or Rest(2) -> ... 
This gives 2 shops in first 5 floors! Great for healing gap.

PATH B (x=3 start): F1 Monster(3) -> F2 Shop(3) -> F3 Unknown(3) or Monster(4) -> F4 Unknown(3) -> F5 Monster(3) or Unknown(4) -> ...
One shop at F2, decent.

PATH C (x=5 start): F1 Monster(5) -> F2 Monster(6) -> ... no early shop. BAD.

Per heuristics: Act 2 route must include non-combat in first 2-3 floors. Path A and B both have shop at F2.

Full route plan via Path A:
F1: Monster(x=1)
F2: Shop(x=2) - buy healing items!
F3: Unknown(x=3) or Monster(x=2)
F4: Monster(x=2) -> leads to F5 Shop(x=2) or Monster(x=1)
F5: Shop(x=2) -> leads to F6 Monster(x=1)
F6: Monster(x=1) -> leads to F7 Monster(x=0) or Elite(x=1)
F7: Elite(x=1) -> F8 Unknown(x=1) -> F9 Treasure(x=1) -> F10 Rest(x=0) -> F11 Elite(x=0) or Monster(x=1) -> ...
OR
F7: Rest(x=2) -> F8 Monster(x=2) -> F9 Treasure(x=3) -> F10 Rest(x=3) -> ...

Let me trace a good full route:
F1: Monster(1) -> F2: Shop(2) -> F3: Monster(2) -> F4: Monster(2) -> F5: Shop(2) -> F6: Monster(1) -> F7: Rest(2) if needed OR Elite(1) if strong -> then work to F10 Rest -> F15 Rest -> Boss

Actually going x=1 start -> x=2 shop -> x=2 monster -> x=2 monster -> x=2 shop -> x=1 -> ...
Double shop access is huge for addressing healing gap.

Chosen route: START x=1 (Monster) -> Shop at F2 to buy healing/remove cards

events.command: play Bash+ 0; play Pommel Strike 0; end
events.translated: Bash+ → Chosen → Pommel Strike → Chosen → End Turn
events.reasoning: Chosen Turn 1: Poke 5x2=10 incoming. Bash+ for 10 dmg + Vuln 3 turns, Pommel Strike for 9 dmg + draw. Total ~19 dmg. No block - take 10 to 70 HP. Vuln sets up big damage T2+. Hex comes T2 so minimize skills after that.

events.command: play Shrug It Off; play Double Tap; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Shrug It Off → Double Tap → Strike → Chosen → End Turn
events.reasoning: Chosen Turn 2: Hex (no damage) being applied. Skills safe this turn since Hex not active yet. Shrug It Off for 5+1(Dex)=6 block + draw, then Double Tap + Strike on Vuln Chosen = 9*2=18 dmg. No incoming damage this turn. After this, Hex active - minimize skills.

events.command: play Double Tap; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Double Tap → Strike → Chosen → End Turn
events.reasoning: Double Tap + Strike on Vuln Chosen = 9*2 = 18 damage. No damage incoming (Hex turn). Chosen goes to ~56 HP. After this Hex is active, must use attacks only.

events.command: play Thunderclap; play Pommel Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Thunderclap → Pommel Strike → Chosen → Strike → Chosen → End Turn
events.reasoning: Hex active - play ONLY attacks. Thunderclap (4 dmg + reapplies Vuln), Pommel Strike (13 dmg + draw), Strike (9 dmg). Total ~26 dmg, Chosen to ~30. No skills to avoid Dazed flooding. Taking debuff damage but preserving deck quality.
1E left. Strike on Vuln Chosen for 9 dmg, to ~28 HP. DEBUFF incoming (Drain=3 Weak+3 Str or Debilitate=10+2 Vuln). No block but keeping deck clean from Dazed.
Use Attack Potion for extra attack card to help kill Chosen this turn. 28 HP left, only 1 attack in hand.
check card reward options
Take Headbutt - 1E attack for 9 dmg, adds to hand immediately for this combat. Best option to help kill Chosen.

events.command: play Headbutt 0; play Double Tap; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Headbutt → Chosen → Double Tap → Strike → Chosen → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Chosen at 28 HP, attacking 21. Headbutt (0E)=9 dmg, Double Tap (1E, adds 1 Dazed from Hex but worth it) + Strike (1E)=6*2=12 dmg, Defend (1E)=6 block. Total 21 dmg -> Chosen to 7. Take 21-6=15 to 55 HP. Kill next turn.
Put Pommel Strike on top of draw pile for next turn - attack + draw, no Hex Dazed penalty

events.command: play Double Tap; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Double Tap → Strike → Chosen → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Chosen at 18 HP, attacking 21. Double Tap (1E, +1 Dazed from Hex) + Strike doubled (1E)=6*2=12 dmg -> Chosen to 6. Defend (1E)=6 block. Take 21-6=15 to 55 HP. Kill next turn with any attack.
Kill Chosen at 6 HP with Pommel Strike (9 dmg with Weak = 6, still enough). Fight over.
View card reward options
Take Flame Barrier - 2E for 4 block + 4 counter damage when hit. Excellent vs multi-hit enemies (Book of Stabbing, Byrds, multi-enemy fights). Fills block scaling gap. High priority on tier list.
Collect rewards and move to map
Shop at F2 - critical for buying healing potions/relics and removing Strikes to address healing gap
Enter shop to see inventory

SHOP DECISION: Metallicize (36g) is must-buy. Passive 3 block/turn, Power so no Hex trigger, great vs Automaton long fights. Then card removal (75g) to thin deck. Total 111g of 144g. No healing available at this shop unfortunately - will need to find it later. Clothesline could be bought too (45g) but that exceeds budget with removal.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: SHOP DECISION: Metallicize (36g) is must-buy. Passive 3 block/turn, Power so no Hex trigger, great vs Automaton long fights. Then card removal (75g) to thin deck. Total 111g of 144g. No healing available at this shop unfortunately - will need to find it later. Clothesline could be bought too (45g) but that exceeds budget with removal.
Buy Metallicize for 36g - passive 3 block/turn, Power so no Hex trigger, excellent for Automaton fight and all long combats
Card removal for 75g - will remove a Strike to thin deck to 14 cards
Remove Strike - weakest card in deck, Strikes outclassed by better attacks
Confirm Strike removal
Done shopping - bought Metallicize and removed Strike. Leave shop.
Leave shop room and go to map
Monster(x=2) at F3 -> leads to Monster(x=2) at F4 -> Shop(x=2) at F5. Known fights give card rewards, and second shop in 3 floors could have healing items.

Whirlwind (card 1) for all 3E - hits all Byrds 3 times each, stripping 3 Flight each = grounded! Better than Thunderclap+Whirlwind because 3 hits strips all Flight vs 1+2=3. Incoming ~10 dmg from 2 Byrds pecking.

Byrds grounded and stunned - only 3 dmg each = 9 total. Perfect setup turn. Metallicize (1E) = +3 block/turn permanent. Flame Barrier (2E) = 4 block + 4 counter per hit this turn. Block = 4 (FB) + 3 (Met) = 7 vs 9 = take 2. Excellent value for powers that compound.

events.translated: Double Tap → Pommel Strike → Byrd → Thunderclap → End Turn
events.reasoning: Byrds grounded, going airborne. Double Tap (1E) + Pommel Strike on Byrd 2 (1E) = 9*2=18 dmg, kills Byrd 2 at 18 HP exactly. Thunderclap (1E) = 3 dmg to remaining + Vuln. Reduces incoming by 33% by killing 1 Byrd. Metallicize gives 3 block at end of turn.
Thunderclap (1E) for 3 AOE to both Byrds + Vuln. They go airborne with Flight 3 but Vuln helps next turn damage. Metallicize gives 3 block. 0 incoming this turn (Go Airborne).

FLAME BARRIER COUNTER STRATEGY: FB (2E)=4 block + 4 thorns/hit. Both Byrds Peck 1x5=10 total hits. Each thorn hit strips Flight AND deals damage. Per Byrd: 5 hits trigger 5x thorns = ~14 dmg each (Flight reduction then grounded). Byrds at 17 and 16 HP will be at ~3 and ~2 HP! Defend (1E)=6 block. Total block: 4+6=10 vs 10 incoming = full block. Metallicize adds 3 at end of turn. ZERO damage taken and Byrds nearly dead!
Take Attack Potion - fills empty potion slot
View card reward options
Skip all 3 - none fill gaps. Anger bloats deck, Warcry triggers Hex, Wild Strike adds Wounds. Keep deck lean at 15 cards.
Done with rewards, move to map
Monster(x=2) at F4 - only path. Leads to Shop at F5 where I can look for healing items.

events.translated: Flame Barrier → Shrug It Off → End Turn
events.reasoning: Cultist+Chosen fight. Chosen Poke 5x2=10, Cultist buffing Ritual. Flame Barrier (2E)=4 block+4 thorns/hit. Shrug It Off (1E)=6 block+draw. Block: 4+6=10 vs 10 incoming = full block. FB thorns: 2 hits * 4 = 8 dmg to Chosen. Next turn Chosen uses Hex (no damage), giving free turn to attack. Kill Chosen first per heuristics - Hex is catastrophic.

events.translated: Pommel Strike → Chosen → Strike → Chosen → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Target Chosen first (kill priority per heuristics). Pommel Strike (1E)=9 dmg on Chosen + draw. Strike (1E)=6 on Chosen. Defend (1E)=6 block vs Cultist 6. Chosen to 73 HP. Hex applies this turn - after this, minimize skills. Full block on Cultist.

Metallicize (1E, Power - safe from Hex) = +3 block/turn permanent. Strike (1E) on Chosen for 6 dmg -> 73 HP. Cultist attacks 6, Met gives 3 block -> take 3 to 64 HP. Powers never trigger Hex, so Metallicize is safe to play even after Hex.

events.translated: Thunderclap → Defend → Spot Weakness → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Hex active, 19 incoming (Cultist 9 + Chosen 10). Save Impervious for boss Hyper Beam. Thunderclap (1E)=3 AOE+Vuln. Defend (1E)=6 block (+Dazed). Spot Weakness on Cultist (1E, attacking)= +3 Str (+Dazed). Block: 3(Met)+6(Def)=9 vs 19, take 10 to 54. Str will help kill faster. 2 Dazed added but acceptable tradeoff for +3 Str permanent.

events.translated: Spot Weakness → Cultist → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: 2E left, 19 incoming. Spot Weakness on Cultist (1E)= +3 Str permanent, adds Dazed. Defend (1E)= 6 block, adds Dazed. Block: 6+3(Met)=9 vs 19. Take 10 to 54. Two Dazed but +3 Str accelerates kill speed significantly. Save Impervious for Automaton Hyper Beam.

Defend (1E)=6 block+Dazed. Block: 6+3(Met)=9 vs 19 incoming. Take 10 to 54. 3 Dazed total now but +3 Str makes all future attacks hit much harder. Chosen should die in 2-3 turns with Str boosted attacks.

CRITICAL TURN: 45 raw damage incoming * 1.5 Vuln = 67 effective. Have 54 HP. Need max block. Shrug (1E)=6 block+draw (+Dazed). Then Defend (1E)=6 block (+Dazed). Hope to draw another block card. 12 block + 3 Met = 15 min. Survive with 2 HP. Stopping to check drawn card before spending last 1E.

Defend (1E)=6 block (+Dazed). Strike on Chosen (1E)=6+3(Str)=9 dmg. Total block: 9+6+3(Met)=18 vs 67 incoming. Take 49 to 5 HP. Barely survive. Every point of damage on Chosen matters for kill speed. Cannot afford to play passively - Cultist scales +3 Str/turn.

Whirlwind (1E)=8 dmg to BOTH enemies. 16 total vs Strike 9 to one. Block: 15+3(Met)=18 vs 67 incoming. Take 49 to 5 HP. Tight but alive. Need to kill Chosen next turn or this becomes unwinnable with Cultist scaling.

EMERGENCY: 27 HP, 55+ effective incoming damage. Hand is 2 Dazed + 2 Defend + Flame Barrier, max 13 block. Dead if I stay. Smoke Bomb to flee - losing this fight is better than dying. Will lose gold but survive.
Use Smoke Bomb to flee combat - lethal incoming damage

FLED from Cultist+Chosen at 27 HP. Hex Dazed flooding + double scaling was lethal. Now 33 HP (Burning Blood +6). Need to reach rest site ASAP. Route: F5 Shop -> F6 -> F7 Rest(x=2). Conservative play essential.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: FLED from Cultist+Chosen at 27 HP. Hex Dazed flooding + double scaling was lethal. Now 33 HP (Burning Blood +6). Need to reach rest site ASAP. Route: F5 Shop -> F6 -> F7 Rest(x=2). Conservative play essential.
Proceed to map after fleeing
No rewards from fled combat, proceed to map
Shop(x=2) at F5 - safer than combat at 33 HP. May find healing potions. Route: Shop -> Monster -> Rest at F7.
Choose Shop path
Enter shop
Nothing useful I can afford at this shop. Save 46g for later. Leave.
Leave shop
Leave shop

Only path: Monster(x=1) at F6. At 33 HP need to fight carefully. Metallicize + Flame Barrier should help minimize damage. After this: F7 Monster(x=0) -> F8 Unknown(x=0) or Unknown(x=1) -> F9 Treasure -> F10 Rest.
Take monster path at F6

events.translated: Metallicize → Thunderclap → Pommel Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: 3 Cultists all buffing (Ritual) - FREE TURN, 0 incoming! Metallicize (1E) = +3 block/turn permanent. Thunderclap (1E) = 3 AOE + Vuln to all. Pommel Strike (1E) on Cultist 0 = 13 dmg + draw. Kill speed critical - they scale +3 Str/turn each. Focus fire one at a time.
Play Metallicize - permanent 3 block/turn

events.translated: Thunderclap → Pommel Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Thunderclap (1E)=3 AOE+Vuln to all 3 Cultists. Pommel Strike (1E) on Cultist 0=13 dmg(Vuln)+draw. Focus fire. 0 incoming this turn. Cultist 0 to 35 HP.
Thunderclap for 3 AOE + Vuln to all
Pommel Strike on Cultist 0 = 13 dmg (Vuln) + draw. Focus fire to eliminate ASAP.
End turn 1. Metallicize gives 3 block. 0 incoming.
End turn. Metallicize 3 block + 6 from Defend. 0 incoming (all buffing).
Spot Weakness on Cultist 0 (attacking) = +3 Str permanent. Critical for kill speed. Str 3 makes all attacks deal +3 base.
Bash+ on Cultist 0 = (10+3)*1 = 13 dmg + Vuln 3. Cultist 0 to 34 HP.
No energy for block. Take 18 - 3(Met) = 15. To 18 HP. Dangerous but Str 3 + Vuln enables fast kill next turns.
Impervious = 30 block. Critical survival play. 36 incoming - 33 block (30+3 Met) = take 3.
Thunderclap 1E = 4 AOE + Vuln to all. Block at 31+3=34 vs 36 incoming, take 2.
34 block vs 36 incoming. Take 2 to 14 HP. Next turn will be critical with 45+ incoming.
EMERGENCY: 14 HP, 45 incoming. Max block = 13. Need Colorless Potion for potential save (Dark Shackles, Bite, etc).
Deep Breath - 0E, draws 1 card for free. Extra card might be Defend for more block.
Deep Breath (0E) - draw 1 card for free. Need every block card I can get.

DEATH INCOMING: 14 HP, 45 damage incoming, max block 13. No survival path. Hex+Chosen fight drained too much HP, and healing gap (no Reaper) meant no recovery. Playing for max damage to see if thorns can help.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: DEATH INCOMING: 14 HP, 45 damage incoming, max block 13. No survival path. Hex+Chosen fight drained too much HP, and healing gap (no Reaper) meant no recovery. Playing for max damage to see if thorns can help.
Flame Barrier (2E) = 4 block + 4 thorns. Best defensive option, thorns deal 12 to Cultists.
Defend (1E) = 6 block. Total 13 vs 45.
22 block vs 45 incoming. Will die. No other options.
